Precondition: The right arm can reach the left side face of box_red_1 and there is clear free table space to the left of the stacked boxes so box_red_1 can be displaced without toppling the stack onto box_green_1.
Postcondition: box_red_1 is displaced off the top of box_green_1 onto the table to the left, leaving the top of box_green_1 unobstructed.

Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of box_green_1 and the tabletop area behind box_green_1 is free so it can be slid toward the table edge without colliding with box_red_1.
Postcondition: box_green_1 is slid to a more accessible position (toward the robot/table edge) while remaining upright on the table.
